meta.name: Pink Bodycare
meta.description: A playful, vibrant body care and skincare brand with a distinctive, cheeky tone of voice. The aesthetic is modern and slightly retro, characterized by bold pastel colors, primarily pink, high-contrast black monospace typography, and candid, lifestyle-focused product photography. It targets a younger, energetic demographic interested in clean, fun beauty products.

header.notes: Header is placed below the first two sections (hero and shop by concern) in an unusual layout, though it functions as a standard sticky header in typical implementations. It features a boxed logo with a black border on the left, centered nav links in monospace uppercase, and icons on the right including currency selector, search, account, and cart.

footer.notes: Features a large boxed logo on the left. Four columns layout. Bottom area includes currency selector, social media icons on the left, and a large array of payment method badges on the right. Typography is monospace for headings.

productCard.notes: Minimal product cards with a light grey background for the image area. Centered monospace text for title and price below. Some cards feature 5-star rating stars.

productGrid.notes: Standard grid layout. 'Shop by collection' features a 6-column layout with isolated product images on a colored background.

featuredProducts.label: WHAT'S HOT
featuredProducts.notes: Clean 4-column grid of best-selling products. Grey background for product images, white background for text area.

content.body: Promotional offer and sign up prompt
content.specialElements: Clickable promotional banner at the very top

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-width image background, content aligned to left

design.text: White monospace display font for headline, white sans-serif for subtext
design.styling: Content padded from bottom left, prominent square CTA button

content.headline: Bold, cheeky product benefit statement
content.cta: Single white rectangular button with black monospace text, zero border radius

media.description: Lifestyle shot of a person's shoulder and back holding a pink tub of body scrub, warm lighting

sections.notes: Features a large, impactful background image with clear typography overlay.

sections.name: quote

content.headline: Aspirational, confident brand statement or quote

sections.notes: Acts as a visual break and reinforces brand positioning.

sections.name: shop-by-concern

design.styling: Cards feature a square image top, text and CTA below, uniform spacing

content.headline: Section title indicating shopping by skin concern
content.cta: Square white buttons with black text under each category description

media.description: Grid of 4 close-up lifestyle images showing product application on different body parts

content.specialElements: Carousel dot indicators below the grid, suggesting swipeability on smaller screens

sections.notes: Highly visual category navigation using lifestyle imagery rather than standard product shots.

sections.name: banner-scrub

design.background: Full-bleed lifestyle photograph with slight dark vignette
design.text: White monospace display font, very large, overflowing off-screen
design.styling: Centered CTA button over the image

content.headline: Large, cut-off cheeky action phrase
content.cta: Single white rectangular button, black text, zero border radius

media.description: Lifestyle shot of legs applying body scrub, dynamic composition

content.specialElements: Floating promotional tab on the left edge

sections.notes: Designed for visual impact, using typography as a graphic element.

design.text: Dark foreground, monospace heading, small sans-serif for product details
design.styling: Product images on light grey square backgrounds

content.headline: Section title indicating trending or popular items

media.description: Clean product shots on light backgrounds

content.specialElements: Floating accessibility/contrast toggle widget on the left

sections.name: featured-product-split
sections.layout: 2-column grid, 50/50 split. Left: product on solid color, Right: lifestyle image background with text overlay

design.background: Split background: left solid pale purple (#EAE4F2), right full-bleed image
design.text: Dark text on left, white text on right. Monospace typography mixed with sans-serif
design.styling: No gap between columns, full width

content.headline: Product focus headline
content.body: Descriptive text about the product ingredients and benefits

media.description: Left: Isolated product bag on purple background. Right: Smiling person holding product bag against face, lifestyle shot

content.specialElements: Carousel dots on the left column suggesting multiple product views

sections.notes: Effective way to show product packaging alongside lifestyle usage.

sections.name: shop-by-collection

design.styling: No cards, just isolated images with text below

content.headline: Section title for browsing by product type

media.description: Isolated cut-out product shots, some grouped as kits

sections.notes: Clean visual categorization using cut-out product photography.

sections.name: rewards-program
sections.layout: 2-column grid, ~40/60 split. Left: graphic logo over image, Right: text content

design.background: Solid bright pink/red (#D72A3D) left, solid lighter pink (#F2B8BA) right
design.text: Dark monospace text on right, white bold graphic typography on left
design.styling: Distinct color blocking, text aligned left within its container

content.headline: Rewards program name and headline
content.body: Explanation of loyalty program benefits and perks
content.cta: Single text link with underline, uppercase monospace

media.description: Left: Graphic text overlaying a partial image of legs in a white robe

sections.notes: Strong promotional block for customer retention program.

sections.name: social-feed
sections.layout: Left-aligned headings, followed by a 4-column grid of mixed media

design.styling: Images touch each other or have minimal gap, vertical orientation

content.headline: Social media call to action and hashtag

media.description: Grid of TikTok/Reels style vertical videos and lifestyle images showing product use

sections.notes: User-generated content style gallery, heavily focused on short-form video formats.

design.text: Dark foreground, monospace headings, sans-serif small body text
design.styling: Centered content within each column, simple line-art icons
